system.description: Your connection to your own potential allows your alternate selves to take the place of any person you meet. Shake someone’s hand and roll [quality].
system.synopsis: Replace someone with one of your copies

outcomes.success: the target is immediately replaced with a copy of you that has all of the target’s expertise, knowledge, and history. They will tend toward being friendly, but their unique situation may mean they have information they can’t share, or that makes them believe they should still hinder you. The more different this version of you is from you, the more likely they will be in conflict with you.
outcomes.triscendence: you can apply this effect to any number of mundane targets you can currently see.
outcomes.failure: the target does not change, but they receive a sudden rush of your memories up to that moment. They understand who you are and what you’re trying to do–and are able to use at least one of your Anomalous Abilities. At least one Loose End.
